calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2008 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Deft'S Appeal Of The Order, Decision Or Award Of The Labor Commissioner Or In The Alternative For An Order To Post Bond By Date Certain; Request For Attorney Fees; Memorandum Of P/A In Support Thereof. (Labor Code 98.2(B) And (C)
Off Calendar Sep-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT JULIA HARDIN'S Motion To Dismiss Defendant's Appeal Of The Order, Decision Or Award Of The Labor Commissioner Or In The Alternative For An Order To Post Bond By Date Certain; Request For Attorney Fees.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANT, NO PROOF THAT APPELLANT FILED BOND. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Deft'S Appeal Of The Order, Decision Or Award Of The Labor Commissioner Or In The Alternative For An Order To Post Bond By Date Certain; Request For Attorney Fees; Memorandum Of P/A In Support Thereof. (Labor Code 98.2(B) And (C)
Off Calendar Aug-01-2008 Continued To Sep-02-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT'S MOTION TO DISMISS DEFENDANT'S APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR AN ORDER TO POST BOND BY DATE CERTAIN; REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES

Appearances:
Anne Hipshman of the Department of Industrial Relations (703.4863) for moving party
Sean O'Halloran of Crone Rozynko (955.8900) for defendant/appellant and responding party

The matter was not argued. The Court modified its order as follows: Appellant must post a bond within 30 days or the appeal shall be dismissed. As directed in the Order signed in Court, the matter is continued to September 2, 2008 to give appellant an opportunity to post bond. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick Mahoney; Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225
